sentiment.reasoning: An 8% margin improvement directly signals increased profitability and operational efficiency.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co reports record quarterly revenue, up 18% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 18% is a strong indicator of robust business performance.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co reports 7% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 7% increase in customer acquisition is a solid indicator of expanding market reach.

headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace faces regulatory review of enterprise software practices

sentiment.reasoning: A regulatory review introduces potential legal and operational risks that create market uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
